entry.title: Entry #4 in Herring v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-01733
entry.summary: STANDING ORDER REGARDING CIVIL LITIGATION. Signed by Judge Mark H. Cohen on 4/2/26. (lme) (Entered: 04/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #3 in Herring v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-01733
entry.summary: AMENDED COMPLAINT against Shantorria Herringwith Jury Demand filed by Shantorria Herring.(Felton, Eugene) Please visit our website at http://www.gand.uscourts.gov/commonly-used-forms to obtain Pretrial Instructions and Pretrial Associated Forms which includes the Consent To Proceed Before U.S. Magistrate form. (Entered: 04/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #2 in Herring v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-01733
entry.summary: Electronic Summons Issued as to Tesla, Inc.. (tcc) (Entered: 04/02/2026)

entry.title: Entry #1 in Herring v. Tesla, Inc., 1:26-cv-01733
entry.summary: COMPLAINT with Jury Demand filed by Shantorria Herring. (Filing fee $405, receipt number AGANDC-15128524) (Attachments: # 1 Civil Cover Sheet)(tcc) Please visit our website at http://www.gand.uscourts.gov/commonly-used-forms to obtain Pretrial Instructions and Pretrial Associated Forms which includes the Consent To Proceed Before U.S. Magistrate form. (Entered: 04/02/2026)
